ecarx.carext.update.ota

Annotation Type InstallListener.Status


  • @Retention(value=SOURCE)
public static @interface InstallListener.Status
    Installation status.
    Since:
    5

    • Field Detail

      • PENDING

        public static final int PENDING
        Before installation.
        Since:
        5

      • DEFERRED

        public static final int DEFERRED
        Installation deferred.
        Since:
        5

      • COMPLETED

        public static final int COMPLETED
        Installation completed, need reboot.
        Since:
        5

      • POST_STARTED

        public static final int POST_STARTED
        Post check started.
        Since:
        5

      • POST_COMPLETED

        public static final int POST_COMPLETED
        Post check completed.
        Since:
        5

      • FINISHED

        public static final int FINISHED
        Installation finished but post check failed.
        Since:
        5

      • FAILED

        public static final int FAILED
        Installation failed.
        Since:
        5

      • FAILED_CRITICAL

        public static final int FAILED_CRITICAL
        Installation failed critical.
        Since:
        5

      • ABORTED

        public static final int ABORTED
        Installation aborted.
        Since:
        5

      • RESET_SYSTEM

        public static final int RESET_SYSTEM
        Reset system.
        Since:
        5

      • PRE_CHECKING

        public static final int PRE_CHECKING
        Pre installation check
        Since:
        11
